text.value: Due date:
Name: Age: years, months, days Contact person: House number: Kitongoji:
Visit type: Referral Follow-up
Phone:
Client Information

As a CHV, you are responsible for making sure that you are providing the community with health education and services while trying to take precautions to stop the transmission of Corona virus to one another. Therefore, make sure you consider the following while you conduct the visits: • Wash your hands with soap/sanitizer as many time as you can while at home, once you are at the client's house and when you leave. • Keep a 2 meters distance while talking to your clients. • Don't shake hands with your clients. • Avoid group gatherings. • Provide the service at the open space and if it should be inside, make sure the windows and doors are open. • Cover your mouth with a towel or elbow when you sneeze or cough. • Do not go for a visit if you have symptoms of fever, cough or frequent sneezing. • Please remember to do the covid education visit before or after submitting this form.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
_Congratulate the client on making the visit to the health facility._
_Discuss the reasons, and try to solve the problems and plan for the referral completion._
No
Yes
Did you get the services?
No service providers were available
Other
The services I needed were not offered when I went
There were too many people
I was asked to pay for services
Health workers treated me badly
Why did you not get any services at the health facility?
_Discuss the reasons, and try to solve the problems through advice, and plan how the client may get services._
I did not want to go
I have no money
I did not have permission to go
Other
Why did you not go to the facility?
I'm coming to check up on you. On my visit on , I gave you a referral to the health facility for the following reasons:
No
Yes
Do you think you need to complete this referral?
I will come back 3 days from now to make sure you completed this referral.
_Remember to report to the nearest health facility._
To address an urgent child danger sign.
To address child danger sign.
To get ANC services since your pregnancy is 6 months or more.
To receive specialized care for small babies.
To address issues of malnourishment.
To address an urgent neonatal danger sign.
To address issues of anemia.
To address one or more urgent postpartum danger signs.
To address one or more postpartumdanger signs.
To address urgent pregnancy danger signs.
To address one or more pregnancy danger signs.
To address a neonatal danger sign.
To address issues around learning and child development.
To make sure he/she has received the proper vaccines.
No
Yes
Did you go to the health facility?
Referral follow-up
Tarehe ya mwisho ya tembeleo:
Jina: Umri: miaka, miezi, siku Mtu wa karibu kwa mawasiliano: Namba ya nyumba: Kitongoji:
Aina ya tembeleo: Ufuatiliaji wa Rufaa
Mawasiliano:
Maelezo ya Mteja

Kama mhudumu wa afya ya jamii, una jukumu la kuhakikisha unatoa elimu ya afya ya jamii na huduma huku ukijikinga ili kuepusha kusambaa kwa maambukizi ya korona kutoka kwa mtu mmoja kwenda kwa mwengine. Hivyo hakikisha unazingatia yafuatayo wakati ukiwa unatoa huduma: • Osha mikono yako kwa maji na sabuni au kutumia vitakasa mikono mara nyingi kadiri unavyoweza ukiwa nyumbani kwako,nyumbani kwa mteja wako na pindi ukimaliza kutoa huduma. • Hakikisha kuna umbali wa mita mbili kati yako na mteja wako unayeenda kumtembelea • Pindi ukiongea na wateja wako , usishikane mikono. • Epuka mikusanyiko. • Toa huduma katika maeneo yaliyo wazi na ikitokea ukafanya ndani hakikisha milango na madirisha yanakuwa wazi. • Funika mdomo wako kwa kitambaa au kiwiko unavyooenda chafya au kukohoa. • Tafadhali usiende kutoa huduma ukijihisi na dalili za homa na kukohoa na kwenda chafya kwa wingi. • Tafadhali kumbuka kufungua fomu ya kuwaelimsiha wanakaya juu ya maambukizi ya korona na jinsi ya kuchukua tahadhari. Tembeleo kuhusu korona unaweza kulifanya kabla ya kuanza tembeleo lako au mara baada ya kumaliza tembeleo lako hili.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
_Mpongeze mteja kwa kuenda kituo cha afya._
_Jadili sababu na jaribu kutatua tatizo na panga naye kuhusu kukamilisha rufaa._
Hapana
Ndiyo
Je ulipata huduma?
Hakukuwa na mtoa huduma
Nyenginezo
Huduma nilizotaka hazikuwepo.
Kulikuwa na watu wengi
Walitaka nilipie huduma
Wahudumu wa afya hawakunihudumia vizuri
Kwanini hukupata huduma kwenye kituo cha afya?
_Jadili sababu na jaribu kumpa ushauri wa jinsi ya kutatua tatizo na panga naye njia ya yeye kupata huduma._
Sikutaka kwenda
Sina pesa
Sikupewa ruhusa ya kwenda
Nyenginezo
Kwa nini hukwenda kituo cha afya?
Nimekuja kukuangalia. Wakati nilipokutembelea mara ya mwisho nilikupa rufaa ya kuenda kituo cha afya kutokana na sababu zifuatazo:
Hapana
Ndiyo
Je unafikiri unahitaji kuikamilisha rufaa hii?
Nitarudi baba ya siku 3 ili kuhakikisha kuwa umekamilisha hii rufaa.
_Kumbuka kumripoti kwenye kituo cha afya kilicho karibu nawe._
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mtoto.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za mtoto.
Ili kupatiwa huduma za mama mjamzito kwa vile mimba yako ni miezi sita au zaidi.
Apate huduma maalum kwa ajili ya watoto wadogo.
Ili kushughulikia utapiamlo.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mtoto mchanga.
Ili kushughulikia upungufu wa damu.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mama aliyejifungua.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za mama aliyejifungua.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mama mjamzito.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za mama mjamzito.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za mtoto mchanga.
Ili kushughulikia maswala ya kujifunza na maendeleo ya mtoto.
Ili kuhakikisha amepokea chanjo stahiki.
Hapana
Ndiyo
Je ulienda kituo cha afya?
Ufatiliaji wa rufaa

bind.calculate: ../inputs/refer_flag_small_baby= 1 or ../inputs/refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_secondary_neonatal_danger_sign_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_child_danger_sign_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_child_other_danger_sign_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_muac_flag= 1 or ../inputs/refer_refer_palm_pallor_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_vaccines_flag = 1 or ../inputs/refer_slow_to_learn_specifics_flag = 1
